highlights.title: Google just gave Sundar Pichai a $692M pay package
highlights.description: Most of it is tied to performance, including new stock incentives linked to Waymo and Wing, its drone delivery venture.

highlights.title: A roadmap for AI, if anyone will listen
highlights.description: The Pro-Human Declaration was finalized before last week's Pentagon-Anthropic standoff, but the collision of the two events wasn’t lost on anyone involved.
